title: Mayhem
text: Home * Engines * Mayhem Mayhem , (Mayhem NNUE) an UCI compliant open source chess engine by Toni Helminen , written in C++17 , licensed under the GPL v3.0 . Mayham was created by porting the author's former engine Sapeli , written in plain C , to C++17, utilizing Stockfish's NNUE evaluation via Daniel Shawul's Scorpio NNUE egbbdll probing library [1] [2] .
